latest.advisory: Health alert. The entire population is at risk. Stay indoors and use air purifiers.

advisories.Good: Air quality is satisfactory. Enjoy outdoor activities.
advisories.Moderate: Acceptable quality. Sensitive groups may consider limiting prolonged outdoor exertion.
advisories.Unhealthy Sensitive: Children, elderly and people with respiratory conditions should reduce outdoor activity.
advisories.Unhealthy: Everyone may experience health effects. Avoid prolonged outdoor exertion.
advisories.Very Unhealthy: Health alert. The entire population is at risk. Stay indoors and use air purifiers.
advisories.Hazardous: Emergency conditions. Avoid all outdoor exertion.
